name: Media CAPL Functions
title: Media CAPL Functions
description: Sets the input media type for a multiplexer at a given index.
Media Concepts | Media Properties | Major Media Types / Audio Subtypes | Error Codes
tables: MEDIA Only available with option .Ethernet. To use the CAPL functions the AVB_IL.DLL must be included.

This callback is dispatched when an asynchronous read operation on a source reader completes.
Retrieves the calling CAPL program’s last-error code value of the Media API.
Gets the properties used for configuring the behavior of an object.
Sets the properties used for configuring the behavior of an object.
Retrieves a property whose value is a ratio.
Sets a ratio as a 64-bit property value.
Retrieves a property whose value is a size, expressed as a width and height.
Sets width and height as a single 64-bit property value.
Creates the streaming audio renderer (SAR) which is a media sink that renders audio in an output device.
Creates a streaming audio capturer which is a media source that captures audio from an input device.
Enumerates a list of audio capture devices.
Enumerates a list of video capture devices.
Releases a media type retrieved by MediaGetMediaType.
Creates a multiplexor for the provided output media subtype.
Retrieves the media type of a stream the multiplexer produces as output at a given index.
Delivers data to an input stream on this multiplexer.
Generates output from the current input data.
Sets the input media type for a multiplexer at a given index.
Creates the source reader from a media source.
Creates the sink writer from a URL.
Delivers sample data to the sink writer.
Gets the media type for a source reader.
Sets the media type for a source reader or a sink writer.
Creates the source reader from a media source.
Creates the source reader from a URL.
Reads sample data from the media source.
